2.6 Gradient

Definition 2.6.1.

Fix a three variable real function , define

Observe that now we could write

Theorem 2.6.2.

Let , then the level surface at , described by , denoted as .

Proof.

Consider a curve described by . By chain rule,

Thus, . However, is tangent to the curve therefore tangent to . Since is arbitrary, is tangent to all tangent vectors of at , thus tangent to at .

Example 2.6.3.

Find the tangent plane to at .

Solution. The normal to the plane is where .

Thus, the plane is

We continue our discussion with gradient with directional derivatives.
